items.headline: Chipotle (CMG) Tests Crispy Chicken And Happier Hour In Wider Sales Push
items.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) is testing a crispy chicken menu item, a happier hour promotion, and new restaurant remodels. The company is expanding catering and has renamed its group meal offering, with early tests linked to higher sales. These pilots are part of broader operational and menu changes that are being rolled out in select locations. Chipotle Mexican Grill sits at the intersection of fast food and fast casual dining, serving customers who want quicker service with a focus...
